title: ranunculus reptans var. ovalis
intro: Ranunculus reptans var. ovalis, also known as water crowfoot or creeping buttercup, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus reptans var. ovalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and aid in wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
